chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 129 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.7 & 25. 2. For orders on CMA No.1012/2019. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA No.1013/2019. 02.10.2025 Dr. Shah Nawaz Memon, advocate for the applicant. Reference application is pending since 2019 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. On 26.01.2024, following order was passed: “26.01.2024 None present on behalf of the Applicant nor any intimation received. In the interest of justice, adjourned.” Today learned counsel is present, however, merely seeks time. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
